final_draft:
Subject: See Slack and calendar updates right on your board

Preview text: Stop switching between apps to stay in the loop

Body:
Your team's Slack messages and calendar events are important. But checking three different places for the same update gets old fast.

The good news: your Slack and calendar updates can show up directly on your Northbridge board — no more checking three places for the same update.

Connect in seconds. Stay in one place. Keep moving.

CTA: Connect your integrations

final_review.notes: Strong execution. The draft nails the key message verbatim ("your Slack and calendar updates can show up directly on your Northbridge board — no more checking three places for the same update") and maintains the requested practical, low-key tone throughout. Voice is appropriately "we/you," language is plain and conversational, and all banned phrases are avoided. No exclamation points, no fear-based urgency, and no unqualified claims. The copy is concise and well-suited to email. No compliance disclaimers are needed (no certifications, SLAs, or data-handling claims referenced).
